summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Romanian Seismic Waves educational website. All major functionality tested including backend APIs, frontend UI interactions, navigation, interactive components (wave simulator, seismograph, seismic map), quiz functionality, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend API - Root endpoint (/api/) returns 'Unde Seismice API - Active'
Backend API - Health check (/api/health) returns healthy status
Backend API - Quiz submission creates entries with UUID and proper JSON
Backend API - Quiz scores retrieval works correctly
Backend API - Status check CRUD operations functional
Homepage - Hero section loads with 'UNDE SEISMICE' title
Homepage - Explore button visible and clickable
Homepage - Team section displays 3 author cards and school info
Homepage - Intro and stats sections load correctly
Navigation - All 6 navigation links work (Home, Theory, Wave Types, Applications, Quiz, Bibliography)
Theme toggle - Successfully switches between light and dark modes
Sound toggle - Button functional and responsive
Theory page - Loads with comprehensive Romanian content about seismic waves
Wave Types page - Interactive tabs for P, S, Love, Rayleigh waves with animations
Wave Types page - Comparison table displays correctly
Applications page - Wave simulator canvas renders with working play/pause/reset
Applications page - Wave simulator sliders (amplitude/frequency) functional
Applications page - Wave type tabs (P, S, Love, Rayleigh) work correctly
Applications page - Virtual seismograph shows real-time data visualization
Applications page - Earthquake simulation buttons trigger data changes
Applications page - Richter scale badge updates correctly (showed 8.1)
Applications page - Seismic map displays 8 zone markers with clickable interactions
Applications page - Zone info panels appear when markers clicked
Applications page - 3 YouTube videos embedded correctly via iframes
Quiz page - 10 Romanian questions display with 4 answer options each
Quiz page - Answer selection provides instant feedback
Quiz page - Progress tracking and score calculation works
Quiz page - Quiz completion shows results and restart functionality
Quiz page - Kahoot integration link present with correct target='_blank'
Bibliography page - Displays 2 main sources and 6 additional sources
Bibliography page - External links properly formatted with icons
Mobile responsiveness - Hamburger menu appears on mobile viewport (390x844)
Mobile responsiveness - Mobile navigation menu functional with all links
Mobile responsiveness - Theme and sound toggles work on mobile
Footer - Displays correctly with team information and navigation
